title: Brownie's Plushies
description: Adds Plushies from various forms of media, such as Vocaloid and Ultrakill.
body:
_This mod is currently in BETA! If you encounter any bugs or overlooked issues, please write a report over on the Github repository._

Adds multiple plushies from various forms of media.

**Current Plushies:**
- Hatsune Miku Plush (Vocaloid)
- Kasane Teto Plush (Vocaloid)
- V1 ULTRAPLUSH (ULTRAKILL)
- V2 ULTRAPLUSH (ULTRAKILL)
- Gabriel ULTRAPLUSH (ULTRAKILL)
- Madeline Plush (Celeste)
- Badeline Plush (Celeste)
- Commando Plush (Risk of Rain 2)
- Huntress Plush (Risk of Rain 2)
- Bandit Plush (Risk of Rain 2)
- MUL-T Plush (Risk of Rain 2)
- Engineer Plush (Risk of Rain 2)
- Artificer Plush (Risk of Rain 2)

There are currently more plushies and content planned for the future.
- ⚠️-Currently being worked on.
- ❓-Not implemented.
- ✅-Fully implemented

**General Roadmap:**
- 0.3.0, Celeste update ✅
>   Will add Madeline and Badeline as plushes.

- 0.4.0, Risk of Plush update ⚠️
>   Will add every base-game survivor from Risk of Rain 2 as plushes.

- 0.5.0, Outer Wilds update ❓
>   Will add the Protagonist from Outer Wilds as a plush.

- ??? ❓
>   Space for updates 0.6.0-0.9.0.

- 1.0.0, Minecraft update ❓
>   Will add most iconic Minecraft Mobs as plushes.

- Future updates unplanned...
